title: rubus × marnaceus
intro: Rubus × marnaceus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Rubus × marnaceus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
